## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in between Ramp and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance updates, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has published 97 URLs (36 for best credit card), 50 per diem pages, and updated 150 expense pages (50 live, 100 staged)](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Performance metrics show positive trends for published content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Best credit card articles need more time to evaluate performance; deeper analysis requested](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Ramp is publishing city-specific per diem pages internally (21 so far)](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Holiday break: Both teams will be off for the weeks of Dec 23 and Dec 30](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

## Topics

### Team Updates and Introductions

  - [New managing editor, Vivek Shankar, introduced to support Ramp's content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Vivek has previous experience working with Ramp in FinTech](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

### Content Progress and Ongoing Work

  - [97 published URLs (36 for best credit card)](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [50 per diem pages](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [150 expense pages updated (50 live, 100 staged in Airtable)](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Focus on expense page updates due to high traction](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Brex-like articles being worked on by Sarah](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Additional content task from Victoria in progress](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)

### Expense Category Pages Status

  - [50 pages live, 100 staged in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Waiting on performance data of first 50 before publishing next batch](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Potential migration to Sanity CMS being discussed internally at Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)

### Performance Updates

  - [Positive trends across different content clusters:](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [61 URL countries: Higher impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [Per diem articles: Showing growth](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
      - [Best credit card articles: Too early to draw conclusions (1 month of data)](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)

### Best Credit Card Articles Performance

  - [More time needed to evaluate (1-2 months total)](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Planning to analyze top-performing articles' H2s to improve lower-performing ones](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)
  - [Competitive landscape more challenging than per diem pages](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Dentist-specific page performing best, followed by dining and therapist-focused articles](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=1078.0)

### Per Diem Pages Update

  - [Ramp internally published 21 city-specific pages](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Using simple template and existing data](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [Monitoring performance to scale in the new year](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)

### Content Responsibilities

  - [Ramp to handle Brex-style rewrites in-house](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
  - [GrowthX to focus on articles from Victoria](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)

### Holiday Schedule

  - [Both teams on break for weeks of Dec 23 and Dec 30](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [No calls or updates during this period](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Teams to prioritize critical tasks before holiday break](https://fathom.video/share/nty5NknYjzkz9nqoT9bLxzyqRbFr8_rj?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
